name: Glazed Cornish Hens
recipeIngredient: 1 Package of Uncle Ben's Wild Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine the apple jelly and cinnamon. Heat and stir until melted. Set aside.
2. Place the hen halves, skin side up, on a rack in a shallow roasting pan. Sprinkle with salt.
3. Roast in a 350-degree oven for 20 minutes.
4. Brush the hens with the jelly-cinnamon mixture and roast for an additional 25-30 minutes, or until browned and tender.
5. While the hens are roasting, cook the contents of the rice and seasoning packets according to their instructions.
6. Stir in 2 tablespoons of apple jelly, grapes, and celery into the cooked rice.
7. Serve alongside the hens. Sprinkle cashews over the rice.
